message:
test(core,share,server): add 47 tests for wizard, conformal, proptest_generators, static_files

- wizard.rs: 9→32 tests — serde roundtrips for all enums/structs, exhaustive
  code()/category() coverage, Display impls, remaining parse aliases,
  whitespace/case handling, error builder chain, exit code constants
- conformal.rs: 11→20 tests — median odd count, high/low coverage width
  comparison, negative data, tiny window, repeated values, large window,
  empirical coverage bounds
- proptest_generators.rs: 5→12 tests — title_case edge cases (empty, single
  char, caps), proptest_config values, timestamp range validation
- static_files.rs: 8→16 tests — remaining MIME types, case insensitivity,
  no-extension fallback, is_safe_path accept/reject, empty path index

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
